title: Gauhati High Court – Judicial Assistant – 6 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Gauhati High Court Judicial Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Gauhati High Court has released an official recruitment notification for 6 Judicial Assistant vacancies This recruitment offers a great opportunity for graduates with computer knowledge seeking stable government jobs with a salary of ₹37,800 – ₹1,19,700 per month under Pay Level 10. Eligible candidates can apply online from 22 May 2026 to 11 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognized University, Working knowledge of Computer

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gauhati High Court to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
